profile.name: Siddharthan K
profile.title: MERN Stack Developer
profile.bio:
Hi, I'm Siddharthan K, a passionate MERN Stack Developer with a strong interest in creating modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications. I enjoy turning ideas into functional digital solutions by combining clean design with efficient, scalable code.

My expertise includes HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, enabling me to build complete full-stack applications from frontend interfaces to backend APIs and database management. I focus on writing maintainable code, building responsive user experiences, and continuously improving my development skills.

I enjoy solving real-world problems through technology and have experience developing projects such as business websites, portfolio websites, and full-stack web applications. Every project helps me strengthen my knowledge of software development, responsive design, RESTful APIs, authentication, and deployment.

As a developer, I believe in continuous learning and staying up to date with the latest technologies and best practices in web development. My goal is to contribute to innovative teams, build impactful products, and grow into a highly skilled full-stack software engineer.

projects.title: SGS HR Workforce Solution
projects.description: A professional HR consultancy platform with modern UI, service listings, and contact management for workforce solutions in India.

projects.title: Sweet Tooth Trichy
projects.description: An elegant bakery and desserts e-commerce website with menu showcase, ordering system, and beautiful sweet-themed design.

experience.description: Designed and developed responsive websites using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Built full-stack applications with RESTful APIs, authentication systems, and admin dashboards.
highlights: Built SGS HR Workforce Solution — a full corporate consultancy website
Developed Sweet Tooth Trichy — a complete bakery e-commerce platform
Implemented RESTful APIs and MongoDB database schemas
Deployed applications on Vercel, Render, and MongoDB Atlas

services.title: Responsive Websites
services.description: Mobile-first, pixel-perfect responsive designs that look stunning on all devices.

services.title: Full Stack Development
services.description: End-to-end MERN stack applications with React frontend and Node.js backend.

services.title: REST API Development
services.description: Scalable and secure RESTful APIs with Express.js and proper documentation.

services.title: Admin Dashboard
services.description: Custom admin panels for managing content, users, and analytics efficiently.

services.title: MongoDB Database Design
services.description: Optimized NoSQL database schemas and queries using MongoDB and Mongoose.

services.title: Authentication System
services.description: Secure JWT-based auth with login, register, protected routes, and sessions.

services.title: SEO Optimization
services.description: Technical SEO, meta tags, structured data, and performance optimizations.
